sentence: Извини, что не смог прийти раньше
I'm here because I need your help. Will you help me, Ilana?
There are six people I need you to protect. I'm gonna give you a list of their names. This is what you've been preparing for.
Are these people... who are they?
To replace Jacob. She said I was one of them and so are you and so is Hurley.
Well, that's great. So what do we do now?
After I've brought them to the temple, what do I do?
Ask Ricardus, he'll know what to do next.
He is. So, Richard, what do we do next?
Uhh.. I have no idea what we do next. You didn't tell your friends that I was trying to kill myself when you found me? That sounds like someone who has a plan?
Why would Jacob say you knew what to do if--
Because everything he ever said is a lie.
You wanna know a secret, Jack? Something I've known a long, long time. You're dead.

No, I mean literally. We are all dead, every single one of us. And this, this, all this, it's not what you think it is. We're not on an island, we never were. We're in Hell. So, I'm not interested in what Jacob said. In fact, maybe it's time to stop listening to him, and we started listening to someone else, and that's exactly what I'm gonna do.
Why? You heard him he doesn't... doesn't know what we need to do next.
He knows! Jacob told me. He has to know.
Alpert has lost his mind. He thinks that we're, we're in hell. If he cared about what Jacob said, he wouldn't be talking about, about listening to someone else.
Wait, you know who he meant?
If it's any consolation, it's not exactly Locke.
¿Por qué? Que no sé. Sí, yo te puedo ayudar, pero yo no sé como encontrarlo si no sé cómo.... Why? I don't know. Yes, I can help you, but... I don't know how to find him.
Jacob, I saw you talking to him.
Don't lie to me. Please, if you know something, anything that can help us figure out--
Sorry Jack, but this has nothing to do with you.
Richard. Going after him is a waste of time. He doesn't know anything.
And what makes you so sure?
I've known him since I was twelve years old, that should count for something.
So you guys met when you were kids, huh?
No Frank, I was a kid. Richard looked just like he does today.
You're saying this guy doesn't age.
And how the hell do you think that happened?
Voy a buscar al doctor. Si Dios quiere, mi amor, regreso antes del amanecer.
No, no, no, no, Isabella, no.
Cierra tus ojos. Siempre estaremos juntos.
¡No, no puede entrar, no! ¡No puede usted, no debe entrar, no puede pasar!
Perdón, perdón... Perdóneme usted, pero no podía esperar, mi mujer está muy enferma, señor.
No son para ti, me estás goteando el piso.
Mi esposa está tosiendo sangre. Ella lo necesita, por favor, señor.
¿El Socorro? Ese es un viaje de medio día. Yo no voy a cabalgar hasta allá con esta lluvia torrencial. Tengo una medicina que le puede salvar la vida, pero es muy cara.
Sí, sí, claro, lo que sea. Sí, muchísimas gracias, señor. .]
No, no, no. No, por favor, señor. Haré lo que sea para pagarle. Por favor, se lo ruego...
¡Suéltame! ¡Quítame las manos de encima! ¡Te he dicho..! ¡Quítame las manos de encima!
Te traje un poco de comida, hijo mío.
Tal vez la tendrás después. ¿Me permites ver tu Biblia?
Sí. Yo me he estado enseñando yo mismo. Isabella... mi esposa y yo íbamos a ir al Nuevo Mundo. Queríamos comenzar una familia, una vida nueva.
In Nomine Patris et Filii et Spiritus Sancti. Amén. Perdóneme, padre, porque he pecado. Padre, yo... yo maté a un hombre. De verdad me arrepiento. Y le ruego, le ruego, padre, por el perdón de Dios.
No te puedo otorgar la absolución por un asesinato.
Padre, fue un accidente, yo no quería matar a ese señor.
Por favor, Padre, debe de haber alguna manera para recibir el perdón de Dios
La única manera de regresar a Su gracia es a través de la penitencia.
Sí, claro, haré lo que sea.
¡Pero tú no tienes tiempo para nada! Porque mañana... mañana te van a colgar.
No, hijo mío. Me temo que el diablo te espera en el infierno. Que Dios tenga misericordia de tu alma. awaits you in hell. May God have mercy on your soul.]
Señor, por favor, perdona mis pecados, estoy penitente y arrepentido (x4, not clear)
I asked do you speak English? Take him away and bring me another. Hang him.
Yes! I speak English! I speak English!
Wait! You have strong hands, what sort of work did you do?
I worked...I worked in the fields.
I understand you were interested in going to the New World?
Well then, this is your lucky day. Thank you Father.
This man is now the property of Captain Magnus Hanso. Hope you don't get seasick.
Está demasiado oscuro. ¡Espera, puedo ver tierra! ¡Veo la costa! ¡Es una isla!
¡Veo el Diablo! ¡Esta isla está protegida por el Diablo! ! The island is guarded by the devil!]
Dios nos tuvo piedad. Al menos, a algunos de nosotros.
You, Pierce, bring me the Captain.
Good God we're in the middle of the bloody jungle!
Se lo ruego. No lo haga. No lo haga, por favor.
We are shipwrecked in the middle of the jungle. We have no fresh water, and limited supplies, and there are only five officers left.
Why, why are you doing this?
Because if I freed you, it'd only be a matter of time before you tried to kill me.
Santo Padre que estás en el cielo, santificado sea Tu nombre, vénganos Tu reino.
¡Vete de aquí! ¡Te voy a matar! ¡Te voy a matar!
No lo entiendo. ¿Cómo estás tú aquí?
¿No lo sabes, Ricardo? Estamos muertos los dos. Estamos en el infierno. Estoy aquí para salvarte antes de que regrese "él". . I'm here to save you before he comes back.]
Yo miré en sus ojos, y todo lo que vi fue maldad. ¿Tú lo has visto, Ricardo?
¡Corre! ¡Vete, vete! ¡Corre, mi amor! No... debes irte, ¡ya vete!
¡No! ¡Dije que te iba a salvar, mi amor! ¡No! ¡Dije que te iba a salvar, y lo haré, mi amor! Por favor.
Yo sé, pero... ¡si me quieres, vete! ¡Vete!
¡No, no! ¡Déjala en paz! ¡Déjala! ¡Déjala en paz, por favor! ¡¿Isabella?! ¡¿Isabella?!
You... you were not on the ship.
I was here long before your ship.
Did... did you see my, my wife?
Isabella, my wife. She was here. She was. But then the black smoke came and she ran.
That probably means he has her.
If she's alive I must save her, please, please help.
Of course. Of Course I'll help. I want to be free too.
As luck would have it, I found these on one of the officers outside. I think they'll work. But before I try, I need to know that you will help me.
Yes, yes, yes, I do of course.
Yes yes, anything, yes, I promise.
Of course my friend. It's good to see you out of those chains.
Got to get you on your feet. Gonna need your strength if we're going to escape.
That's right. I'm afraid there's only one way to escape from Hell. You're going to have to kill the Devil.
When you're finished eating, you walk due west. Once you get to the ocean, you'll be able to see the Statue.
Your ship smashed through it, on its way inland. Broke it into pieces. That's where you'll find the Devil.
You only have one chance. Put this through his chest. Do not hesitate, do not let him say a word. If he speaks, it will already be too late. He can be very persuasive.
How, how can I kill him with this, he's...black smoke.
My wife Isabella, she was running from you?
She was running from him. I'm sorry. I saw him take her but I couldn't do anything to stop it.
But if you are the black smoke...
You aren't the only one who's lost something, my friend. The Devil betrayed me. He took my body. My humanity.
You killed the officers on the ship.
I'm not the one you need to worry about. The Devil has your wife, and you are going to have to kill him if you ever want to get her back.
Murder is wrong. That is what brought me here.
My friend, you and I can talk all day long about what's right or wrong, but the question before you remains the same - "Do you ever want to see your wife again?"
What are you doing here? Who gave you this?
I don't know your wife. Did she come here on the ship?
Then why are you asking me where she is? Did you meet a man in the jungle dressed in black?
He said you are the devil.
He said the only way I would see my wife again is if I kill you. I - I saw her, here, in this place. Where is she?
Yes, it was! She's dead, just like me.
I am in Hell. I know that I am in Hell.
What are you doing? What are you doing?
Still think you're dead?! Why should I stop?
That's the first sensible thing you've said. What's your name?
Ricardo... Get up, we need to talk.
No one comes in unless I invite them in.
My name is Jacob. I'm the one who brought your ship to this island.

Think of this wine as what you keep calling hell. There's many other names for it too: malevolence, evil, darkness. And here it is, swirling around in the bottle, unable to get out because if it did, it would spread. The cork is this island and it's the only thing keeping the darkness where it belongs. That man who sent you to kill me believes that everyone is corruptible because it's in their very nature to sin. I bring people here to prove him wrong. And when they get here, their past doesn't matter.
Before you brought my ship, there were others?
But if you brought them here, why didn't you help them?

Because I wanted them to help themselves. To know the difference between right and wrong without me having to tell them. It's all meaningless if I have to force them to do anything. Why should I have to step in?
Well, I don't want to step in. Maybe you can do it for me. You can be my...my representative and intermediary between me and the people I bring to the island.
What will I get in return?
Can you absolve me of my sins so I don't go to Hell?
I never want to die. I want to live forever.
You let him talk to you, didn't you?
He told me to give you this.

I'm sure you realize that if you go with him, you'll never see your wife again? I understand. He can be very... convincing. But I want you to know if you ever change your mind, and I mean ever, my offer still stands.
You must've dropped it. I found it on the ship.

I've changed my mind. Are you listening to me? I've changed my mind. I was wrong. You said I could change my mind. You said the offer would stand. Does the offer still stand? Does the offer still stand?! Does the offer still stand?!
What the Hell are you doing here? Did you follow me?
Didn't you hear what I said?!
I told you people, I don't know anything!
I said your wife sent me. Isabella. She wants to know why you buried her cross.
H--how do you know about that?
What do you mean, just told you?
Isabella saw you dig it up, man. She's standing right next to you.
A veces a las personas les toma un poco. .]
Dile que su inglés es magnífico.
She's right there. She says your English is awesome.
She wants you to close your eyes. It's okay, I'll tell you what she says.
No fue tu culpa que yo morí, Ricardo.
No fue tu culpa que yo morí, Ricardo.
Por más que quisiste salvarme, era mi hora.
Te extraño, yo... Yo haría cualquier cosa para estar juntos de nuevo.
She kinda said one more thing. Something you have to do.
She said you have to stop the Man in Black. You have to stop him from leaving the island. 'Cause if you don't... todos nos vamos al infierno. .]
I see you got my present.
Don't gloat, Jacob. It doesn't become you.
So you tried to kill me?
No. I guess I'm just wondering why you did it.
Because I want to leave. Just let me leave, Jacob.
As long as I'm alive, you're not going anywhere.
Well then, now you know why I want to kill you. And I will kill you, Jacob.
Even if you do so, somebody else will take my place.
Here. Something for you to pass the time.
